theme: Tarmoq asoslari — ip, ss, dns, ssh, curl

tasks.title: Server IP manzilini hujjatla
tasks.why: Serverning IP manzilini bilish — ulanish va debug uchun birinchi qadam.
steps: Serverning IP manzilini ko'r:  hostname -I   (yoki: ip a)
Birinchi IP ni myip.txt ga yoz:  hostname -I | awk '{print $1}' > myip.txt

tasks.title: Ochiq (tinglanayotgan) portlar
tasks.why: Qaysi servis qaysi portда eshitayapti? ss — port diagnostikasi asbobi.
steps: Tinglanayotgan TCP portlarni ko'r va yoz:  ss -tlnp > ports.txt

tasks.title: DNS so'rovi (nom → IP)
tasks.why: DNS domen nomini IP ga aylantiradi — internetning asosi.
steps: google.com ni IP ga aylantirib yoz:  getent hosts google.com > dns.txt
tasks.expect: dns.txt ichida google.com ning IP manzili (IPv4 yoki IPv6)

tasks.title: HTTP so'rov (curl)
tasks.why: curl bilan saytga so'rov yuborish va javob (header) ni ko'rish — API debug.
steps: github.com header'larini ol:  curl -sI https://github.com > headers.txt
Ko'r:  cat headers.txt   (HTTP status qatori bo'lishi kerak)

tasks.title: Port bilimi
tasks.why: Standart portlarni yodda tutish — tez diagnostika.
steps: HTTPS qaysi portда ishlaydi? Faqat raqamni port.txt ga yoz:

tasks.title: Tushuntirib ber
steps: TCP va UDP farqini + ping nima uchun ishlatilishini ustozga ayt
